历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwest Jiaotong University in Chongqing Physics Category were approximately 13562 → 14729 → 15839 → 15799 → 16058, showing a gradual backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2500 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 16058, a slight backward shift of about 259 positions compared to 2024, with a slowing fluctuation; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 309 in 2021 → 287 in 2022 → 279 in 2023 → 280 in 2024 → 288 in 2025 → 295 in 2026, with an increase of 7 students (+2.4%) in 2026 compared to 2025, and the slight expansion slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 49th place (52nd in 2025, 59th in 2024), with continuously rising rankings and steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2023 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 94th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention; historical admission anomaly records are low attention, with no gaps or sharp drops; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Transportation, Civil Engineering, and Railway Engineering, with strong disciplinary strength, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous engineering directions, increasing competition for related majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing general college entrance examination is approximately 209,000 (slightly down from 213,000 in 2025), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 137,000 based on historical proportions, roughly the same as 2025; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, geographically close to Chongqing, and has historically been a popular choice for Chongqing candidates; the university's enrollment in Chongqing accounts for about 5%-6% of its total national enrollment, at a medium-high level, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2.4%), continuously rising Soft Science rankings, and high popularity of advantageous engineering majors, it is expected that competition in the 2026 Physics Category will slightly intensify compared to 2025, with a slight backward shift in rankings. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 16322, with a range of 15822–16822.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwest Jiaotong University in Chongqing's History Category were approximately 2831 → 2882 → 3722 → 3667 → 3464. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 2800, but in 2023 it significantly shifted back to 3722. In 2024–2025, it slightly recovered to 3464, with a fluctuation range of about 3400–3700 in the past three years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 31 in 2021 → 39 in 2022 → 42 in 2023 → 42 in 2024 → 40 in 2025 → 35 in 2026. In 2026, there is a reduction of 5 students (-12.5%) compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction that may alleviate competition (ranking numbers decrease).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 49th place, with a continuously rising ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and brand effect. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The Douyin popularity comprehensive ranking is 94th, evaluated as 'average', with no abnormal signal of increased application attention. The university is primarily engineering-oriented, and the History Category majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.) have low correlation with the university's A+ level Transportation Engineering and A level Civil Engineering, so the disciplinary support is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Law is divided and cautious (hot but competitive), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Foreign Languages and Literature is generally cautious. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Chongqing Gaokao is about 209,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 67,000 based on recent proportions, slightly decreasing from 73,000 in 2025. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch score was 438, showing a slight upward trend in recent years. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, which is geographically close to Chongqing, both in the Southwest region, and has historically been a popular choice for Chongqing candidates. The university's enrollment in History Category in Chongqing is small (35–42 students), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 12.5% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026 (main factor), a slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates, the university's rising ranking but low correlation between History Category majors and advantageous disciplines, it is expected that competition in History Category in 2026 will slightly ease compared to 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 3184, with a range of 2706–3662.
